name: api-projeto-integrador
description: API REST para gerenciar Projeto Integrador - Disciplina de Engenharia de Software

scripts.test: newman run tests/collection.postman_collection.json -e tests/environment-local.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/relatorio-local.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Relatório de Testes - Local"
scripts.test:prod: newman run tests/collection.postman_collection.json -e tests/environment-producao.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/relatorio-producao.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Relatório de Testes - Produção"

author: Vanessa Lima
